title: First Period: The Essentials
description: Everything you need to know about your first period, from products to feelings.

episodes.title: Welcome to the Club

hook.text: Amara is in class and she feels it — a warm trickle. Her period has started. She has 3 hours until lunch. This is what she does next.

story.text: Meera was nervous, but she remembered what her mom told her. She reached for her kit and realized she was prepared. 'It's not so bad,' she thought.
story.title: Meera's Discovery

interactiveMoments.text: A period kit contains pads, a clean pair of underwear, and maybe a small snack!
interactiveMoments.title: Wait, what's a kit?

summary.text: You're off to a great start! You've learned that being prepared is half the battle.

reflection.prompt: What's one thing you'd put in your own period kit?

questions.question: What is the first thing Meera did?
A period kit is only for emergencies?
questions.explanation: It's for whenever you need it!

questions.question: How did Meera feel at the end?

episodes.description: Your body is doing something amazing. Let's find out why.
